body_excerpt: In hypx_create_blob_dmabuf of faceauth_hypx.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In hypx_create_blob_dmabuf of faceauth_hypx.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges
